name: Style B EDDM
baseReference: Screenshot supplied by David plus Style A winner 01E advisor-green-band

concepts.title: Hero Gap
concepts.rationale: Style B with the postcard/landing-page headline as the main hook, followed by the lifetime-fee-gap proof and the two-path chart.

concepts.title: Three Taps
concepts.rationale: Style B with the simple three-tap promise and the extra-money poll on the front, leaving the numerical proof and advisor story for the back.

concepts.title: Advisor Proof
concepts.rationale: Style B with the advisor/fiduciary block pulled forward so the fee-gap number is paired immediately with David's human proof.
